subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! We have hearkened unto thy call, and the tumult of thy heart, and the yearning of thy soul in thy love for thy Lord, unto Whom thou shalt return [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد سمعنا ندآئک و ضجیج قلبک و حنین فوادک فی حب مولیک الذی الیه منقلبک
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @knowledge; recognition of God
